{{Quote|The Dantari are a threat to our stormtroopers. At this time, we are devoting all of our efforts to wipe out the remaining Rebel sympathy on this planet. Once the Rebels have been completely stopped, we can then focus our attentions on subjugating the indigenous species, the Dantari.|An Imperial colonel, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:aIC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|an Imperial Colonel|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
The '''Kunga''' were a [[Dantari]] tribe from [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="CDHZ" /> Most of the Kunga lived in their [[Dantari Village (Kunga)|village]]<ref name="SWG:DV" /> and the tribe also established a [[Kunga Stronghold|stronghold]] in a cave.<ref name="SWG:KS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Kunga Stronghold|Dantooine}}</ref> The Kunga were in conflict with the [[Janta]] and the [[Mokk]], another Dantari tribes.<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] considered the Kunga as a threat for their troops.<ref name="SWG:aIC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Kunga appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
